task_summary: Add E2E test generation (Batch 7) and application documentation generation (Batch 8) to scaffolder agent, with scorecard updates, constraint additions, and version bump to 6.3.0.
constraints: Both features are additive — no breaking changes to existing batches or scorecard items
Batch 7 (E2E) is conditional on web project + Playwright in dependencies
Batch 8 (Docs) generates docs/ARCHITECTURE.md and populates Module Docs Path in CLAUDE.md config
File count ceiling must be updated to accommodate new files
Must follow existing batch pattern (Batch 6 is the model for conditional batches)
Scorecard items are informational — do NOT block scaffold
CHANGELOG must follow Keep a Changelog format
success_criteria: Batch 7 generates playwright.config.ts, at least 1 smoke e2e test, and test script in package.json when web+Playwright stack detected
Batch 7 is skipped entirely for non-web projects or projects without Playwright
Scorecard includes 'E2E Test Setup' item conditional on web project + E2E config
Batch 8 generates docs/ARCHITECTURE.md with stack choices, directory structure, key patterns, configuration approach
Batch 8 populates Module Docs Path in the generated CLAUDE.md Automation Config
File count target updated to accommodate new batches
CHANGELOG entry for v6.3.0 is present and accurate
Version in plugin.json and marketplace.json is 6.3.0
skip_rationale: Well-specified roadmap items with clear requirements, identified files, and established patterns (existing Batch 6 conditional pattern). Composite complexity 2, confidence 0.95. Pure markdown edits with zero runtime risk.

destructive_ops.evidence: Task only adds new batches to a markdown agent definition — no file deletions, no database operations, no destructive commands

credential_handling.evidence: No credentials, secrets, tokens, or API keys involved — pure markdown scaffolder definition edits

irreversible_side_effects.evidence: No external communication, no emails, no deployments, no package publishing — edits markdown files only

elevated_privileges.evidence: No sudo, no permission changes, no system-level access required — standard file editing

ambiguous_scope.evidence: Scope is precisely defined: 1 primary file (scaffolder.md) + 4-5 secondary files, all explicitly named in roadmap

network_irreversibility.evidence: No DNS changes, no CDN purges, no webhook registrations — purely local markdown edits

supply_chain_ops.evidence: No package publishing, no registry pushes, no container image builds — pure plugin definition changes

billing_quota_ops.evidence: No cloud resource provisioning, no quota changes, no subscription modifications involved

system_service_effects.evidence: No systemd, no cron, no Docker daemon, no firewall rules — markdown file edits only
